name_en: Paired Images of Ebisu and Daikokuten
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a paired set of images of Ebisu and Daikokuten. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Kamitedo.
A tangible cultural property classified as craft, a damask-silk altar valance (mizuhiki). It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Tatenouchi district.
A tangible cultural property classified as craft, a wooden hexagonal miniature shrine. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Furumachi.

name_romaji: Matsumae Mimasaka-no-kami Michihiro Kō Hitsu Kakegaku

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as craft, a hanging tablet brushed by Lord Matsumae Michihiro. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Ōmachi.

name_en: Ink-on-Paper Life Chronicle of Ono Ryūan
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as an old document, an ink-on-paper chronicle of the life of Ono Ryūan. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

A tangible cultural property classified as a historical material, a folding screen with joint inscriptions by literati. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

name_en: Folding Screen of Village Maps of the Two Shindatsu Districts
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a historical material, a folding screen bearing village maps of the two Shindatsu districts. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Tatenouchi district.

name_en: Large Memorial Tablet for Those Killed in the Iwaya Castle Siege in Chikuzen Province
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a historical material, a large memorial tablet for those who died in the siege of Iwaya Castle in Chikuzen Province. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Shimotedo.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as an archaeological material, a memorial stone stupa of the Gentoku era. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Ōishi.
